message:
feat(widget): port touch/zoom/input improvements to React FrankenTerminal

Port all touch and input handling from the standalone /web demo to the
React FrankenTerminal component:

- Touch state machine (IDLE → TRACKING → SCROLLING/PINCHING)
- Pinch-to-zoom with setZoom() and container refit
- Canvas touch-action:none + user-select:none CSS
- Mouse drag tracking with button state preservation
- Context menu suppression during interaction
- IME composition events (compositionstart/update/end)
- Paste event handling
- Keyboard zoom (Ctrl/Cmd +/-/0) when captureKeys enabled
- Status overlay now shows zoom percentage when zoomed
- overscroll-behavior:none on container to prevent pull-to-refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
